session_notes: Hand-filled after physical checks on Playmobil RC donor board (Wikimedia photo). UNI-T UT139C DMM + Korad KA3005P supply at 0.5A limit.

measurements.target: Confirm common ground between MCU, driver, and load before energizing.
measurements.notes: Donor GND to motor connector shell < 2 ohm; carrier ground strap planned before splice.

measurements.target: Measure supply voltage at the load before attaching pump/motor.
measurements.notes: VMOTOR at J_MOTOR harness with donor pack, motors disconnected.

measurements.target: Dry-run: GPIO high → driver output ON → load sees supply (no MCU on same rail without driver).
measurements.notes: Driver outputs toggled with bench leads; motor leads show rail only when enabled.

measurements.target: No auto-wires generated — verify schematic nets before bench power.
measurements.notes: Carrier SPLICE_PLAN nets reviewed against donor harness pinout.

measurements.target: Ramp VMOTOR / donor supply rail with current-limited bench PSU (≤0.5 A)
measurements.ramp_observation: Ramped 0→6V at 0.5A limit; idle draw 0.09A; no hotspot on driver IC after 30s

measurements.target: Thermal baseline scan at idle after current-limited ramp
measurements.notes: No FLIR on hand — finger probe + photo reference; no abnormal warmth at driver.

artifacts.notes: Donor board before splice (Playmobil RC module, Wikimedia Commons CC BY-SA 4.0)
